preferred_skills: Familiarity with APIs and technical architecture
Experience with Growth Metrics and Funnels
responsibilities: Write detailed product requirement documents (PRDs) and user stories with clear acceptance criteria for engineering teams
Assist in defining and tracking key product metrics and KPIs to measure feature success and user engagement
Conduct user interviews and synthesize qualitative insights to inform product decisions and roadmap priorities
Collaborate with UX designers to review wireframes and prototypes, ensuring alignment with user needs and business goals
Coordinate sprint planning and backlog grooming sessions in partnership with engineering leads and Scrum masters
Perform competitive landscape analysis and market research to identify product gaps and differentiation opportunities
Communicate product updates, timelines, and trade-offs clearly to cross-functional stakeholders including engineering, design, and marketing
Support senior product managers in executing go-to-market strategies and feature launch plans
Monitor post-launch product performance using analytics tools and surface actionable insights to the product team
Triage inbound feature requests and bug reports, prioritizing them against the product roadmap using structured frameworks
